zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Beaumont於1354年7月出生在英國薩默塞特時，她的父親John Beaumont32歲，母親Joan Stockhay16歲。她於1428年之後與John Stretch在英國英格蘭結婚。她去世於1435年8月28日在英國薩默塞特登斯特享年81歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特登斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Beaumont于1354年7月出生在英国薩默塞特时，她的父亲John Beaumont32岁，母亲Joan Stockhay16岁。她于1428年之后与John Stretch在英国英格兰结婚。她去世于1435年8月28日在英国薩默塞特登斯特享年81岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特登斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Beaumont was born in July 1354, in Somerset, England, her father, John Beaumont, was 32 and her mother, Joan Stockhay, was 16. She married John Stretch after 1428, in England, United Kingdom. She died on 28 August 1435, in Dunster, Somerset, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in Dunster, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Beaumont est née en juillet 1354, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John Beaumont, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Joan Stockhay, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé John Stretch après 1428, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée le 28 août 1435, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Beaumont im Juli 1354 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Beaumont 32 und ihre Mutter Joan Stockhay 16. Sie hat nach 1428 in England, United Kingdom John Stretch geheiratet. Sie starb am 28. August 1435 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Dunster, Somerset, England und wurde in Dunster, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Beaumont è nata il nel luglio 1354 nel Somerset, England, sua padre, John Beaumont, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Joan Stockhay, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato John Stretch dopo il 1428, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 28 agosto 1435, nel Dunster, Somerset, England, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a Dunster, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Beaumontが1354年7月にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父John Beaumontは32歳，母Joan Stockhayは16歳であった。1428年以後にイギリスイギリスでJohn Stretchと結婚した。彼女は1435年8月28日にイギリスソメルセトダンスターで81歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトダンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Beaumont(이)가 1354년 7월 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Beaumont(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Stockhay(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1428년 이후 영국 잉글랜드에서 John Stretch(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1435년 8월 28일 영국 서머세트 던스터에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 던스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Beaumont nasceu em julho de 1354, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Beaumont, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Joan Stockhay, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com John Stretch após 1428, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela faleceu em 28 de agosto de 1435, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Beaumont родилась июль 1354 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени John Beaumont было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Stockhay, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Stretch после 1428 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла 28 августа 1435 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Beaumont nació en julio de 1354, en Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, John Beaumont, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Joan Stockhay, tenía 16 años. Se casó con John Stretch después de 1428, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 28 de agosto de 1435, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra.
